Home›Services› Forensic Investigator for Hire
Personal Digital Forensics

Forensic Investigator
for Hire

Private digital forensic investigations for individuals, families, and attorneys — device analysis, hacking evidence, deleted data recovery, and court-admissible reporting.

Private Digital Forensics You Can Trust in Court

When you suspect your device has been compromised, evidence tampered with, or digital records deleted, you need a forensic investigator with both technical depth and legal defensibility. We conduct private digital forensic examinations that are chain-of-custody compliant, attorney-privilege protected when appropriate, and admissible in civil and criminal proceedings.

Investigation Services

  • Mobile device forensics — iPhone, Android, deleted messages, app data
  • Computer forensics — deleted files, browsing history, document activity
  • Account compromise and unauthorized access investigation
  • Email and messaging forensics — spoofing, impersonation, metadata analysis
  • Malware and spyware detection and attribution
  • Social media and online activity forensics
  • Digital evidence preservation with court-admissible hash verification
  • Timeline reconstruction of device or account activity

Who Hires a Private Digital Forensic Investigator?

  • Attorneys seeking digital evidence for civil or criminal cases
  • Individuals who believe they are being stalked, surveilled, or hacked
  • Parents concerned about a child's online activity or exploitation
  • Spouses in contested divorces requiring digital evidence
  • Employees facing wrongful termination involving digital records
  • Business owners investigating internal theft or IP exfiltration

Discretion & Confidentiality

All engagements are conducted under strict confidentiality agreements. When engaged through an attorney, our work may qualify for attorney-client privilege protection. We do not disclose client identities or investigation details to any third party without written consent.

Devices & Sources

  • iPhone & Android
  • Windows & Mac
  • Cloud Accounts
  • Email Platforms
  • Social Media
  • External Drives

Common Cases

  • Hacking & Unauthorized Access
  • Stalkerware / Spyware
  • Divorce Proceedings
  • Wrongful Termination
  • IP Theft Investigation
  • Child Safety Concerns

Speak with an Investigator

Consultations are confidential. We can typically begin an investigation within 24 hours.
